frontmatter.title: Rapid Roll Reloaded
frontmatter.description: A Unity remake of the classic Nokia 'Rapid Roll' arcade game, built to run on any device with keyboard, touch, and gyroscope controls, and shipped to the Play Store.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Rapid Roll Reloaded — guide the ball down the scrolling platforms
